entry.title: MuScriptor: Automatic Multi-instrument Transcription
entry.summary: The best open model for multi-instrument transcription to date.

entry.title: MIRA World Model
entry.summary: A multiplayer world model dreaming of Rocket League.

entry.title: Surflo: Consistent 3D surfaces from a global state
entry.summary: Map any number of views into consistent 3D surfaces at arbitrary resolution via a global state.

entry.title: The FID Lottery
entry.summary: Quantifying the hidden randomness of FID in image generation evaluation.

entry.title: Post-training speech models for better interactivity
entry.summary: Post-training full-duplex spoken dialogue models with RL for improved interactivity

entry.title: Kairos: Understanding Data Temporality Impact on LLM pre-training
entry.summary: Benchmarking LLMs on questions whose answers change with time.

entry.title: Introducing KE:SAI
entry.summary: A new open-science lab dedicated to physical AI, created together with the ELLIS Institute Tübingen.

entry.title: Pocket TTS now supports six languages
entry.summary: Pocket TTS now speaks English, French, German, Spanish, Portuguese, and Italian.

entry.title: MoshiRAG: Asynchronous Knowledge Retrieval for Full-Duplex Speech Language Models
entry.summary: Helping Moshi answer tough questions with help from a text LLM.

entry.title: ARC-Encoder: learning compressed text representations for LLMs
entry.summary: Speeds up RAG, extends the context window, and transfers between LLMs.

entry.title: OVIE: One View Is Enough!
entry.summary: OVIE generates novel views from a single photograph, trained on unpaired internet images.

entry.title: Invincible Voice online demo released
entry.summary: An AI dialogue assistant designed to help people living with ALS communicate more effectively.

entry.title: Hibiki-Zero: Simultaneous Speech-to-Speech Translation Without Aligned Data
entry.summary: Real-time speech translation from four languages.

entry.title: Pocket TTS: a high-quality TTS with voice cloning that runs on CPU
entry.summary: A tiny TTS with any voice you like.

entry.title: CASA: The return of the cross-attention
entry.summary: Leveraging cross-attention for efficient vision fusion.

entry.title: Neural audio codecs: how to get audio into LLMs
entry.summary: Why modeling audio is harder than text, and how to make it feasible with neural audio codecs.

entry.title: Kyutai TTS 1.6B
entry.summary: The nitty-gritty of Kyutai TTS 1.6B, our text-to-speech model.

entry.title: Kyutai TTS and Unmute now open-source
entry.summary: Announcing the open-source release of Kyutai TTS 1.6B and Unmute, with benchmarks and project details.

entry.title: Kyutai Speech-To-Text released as open-source
entry.summary: Announcing the open-source release of Kyutai STT, the streaming speech-to-text model powering Unmute.

entry.title: Unmute: Make LLMs listen and speak
entry.summary: Modular voice AI that empowers any text LLM with real-time speech-to-text and text-to-speech.

entry.title: Helium 1: a modular and multilingual LLM
entry.summary: Announcing Helium 1: a 2B parameter modular and multilingual language model, open-sourced for reproducibility.

entry.title: MoshiVis: Teaching Moshi to Converse about Images
entry.summary: An open-source Vision Speech Model with low-latency and natural conversation skills.

entry.title: Simultaneous, on-device, high fidelity speech-to-speech translation with Hibiki
entry.summary: Announcing Hibiki: simultaneous, on-device, high fidelity speech-to-speech translation.

entry.title: Announcing Helium-1 Preview
entry.summary: Preview release of Helium-1, a lightweight multilingual language model for edge and mobile devices.

entry.title: Moshi open-source release: run Moshi locally!
entry.summary: Release announcement and technical details for Moshi, Helium, and Mimi.

entry.title: Meet Moshi, the first real-time voice AI
entry.summary: Introducing Moshi, a real-time voice AI that brings expressive, spontaneous spoken interaction to machines.

entry.title: Hello Kyutai!
entry.summary: Announcing Kyutai, a Paris-based non-profit AI research lab dedicated to open science.
